programme.desc: Banana Joe lives in a tropical village in Africa which is unaffected by modern life. One day he discovers he needs a permit to operate his boat so goes off to the big city to get one. On the way he witnesses television, crooks and many delights for the first time as well as falling in love.

programme.title: The Way, Way Back
programme.desc: Duncan, a shy teenager, visits a beach house owned by his mother's boyfriend. Annoyed with everyone, he wanders away to a local water park and meets Owen, who helps him open up to the world.

credits.actor: Steve Carell,Toni Collette,Allison Janney,AnnaSophia Robb,Sam Rockwell,Maya Rudolph,Liam James,Rob Corddry,Amanda Peet,River Alexander,Zoe Levin,Nat Faxon,Jim Rash,Adam Riegler,Jeffery Ryan

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: Milly and Jess find their lifelong friendship and lives turned upside down when Milly gets diagnosed with breast cancer while Jess is trying to start a family.

credits.actor: Toni Collette,Drew Barrymore,Paddy Considine,Dominic Cooper,Frances de la Tour,Jacqueline Bisset,Tyson Ritter,Honor Kneafsey,Ryan Baker,Mem Ferda

programme.title: The Way, Way Back
programme.desc: Duncan, a shy teenager, visits a beach house owned by his mother's boyfriend. Annoyed with everyone, he wanders away to a local water park and meets Owen, who helps him open up to the world.

programme.title: The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: The Lake House
programme.desc: Love blooms when Kate, a doctor, exchanges letters with Alex, an architect who is fed up with his life. Unknown to them, they lead lives two years apart.

credits.actor: Keanu Reeves,Sandra Bullock,Shohreh Aghdashloo,Christopher Plummer,Ebon Moss-Bachrach,Dylan Walsh,Scott Elias,Nora Newbrough,Cynthia Kaye McWilliams,India Neilan

programme.title: The Circus
programme.desc: The Tramp is hired by the proprietor of a circus after he stumbles into the middle of a performance and becomes the star attraction. He ends up falling in love with a horse rider.

credits.actor: Charlie Chaplin,Merna Kennedy,Allan Garcia,Harry Crocker,Stanley Sanford,John Rand,George Davis,Henry Bergman,Steve Murphy,Betty Morrissey,Tiny Sandford

programme.title: The Kid
programme.desc: After a woman abandons her child, the Tramp finds him and takes him under his wing. As the boy grows up, the Tramp and the boy try to cope with life's trials and tribulations.

credits.actor: Charlie Chaplin,Jack Coogan,Edna Purviance,Carl Miller,Granville Redmond,May White,Tom Wilson,Henry Bergman,Charles Reisner,Raymond Lee

programme.title: The Great Dictator
programme.desc: After suffering from memory loss, a soldier returns to his former profession as a barber and attempts to escape persecution by the military forces.

credits.actor: Charles Chaplin,Paulette Goddard,Jack Oakie,Reginald Gardiner,Henry Daniell,Billy Gilbert,Maurice Moscovich,Emma Dunn,Grace Hayle,Carter DeHaven,Bernard Gorcey,Paul Weigel

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: Sports agent Jerry Maguire tries to get back on his feet after being fired from his job. However, the only client he has is Rod Tidwell, a disgruntled football player who wants a better contract.

credits.actor: Tom Cruise,Cuba Gooding Jr.,Renee Zellweger,Kelly Preston,Jerry O'Connell,Jay Mohr,Regina King,Bonnie Hunt,Jonathan Lipnicki,Todd Louiso,Mark Pellington,Glenn Frey,Mel Kiper

programme.title: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: New-York based lawyers Audrey and Daniel, who often compete against each other, get married. However, they find it difficult to learn to draw lines between their personal and professional lives.

credits.actor: Pierce Brosnan,Julianne Moore,Michael Sheen,Parker Posey,Frances Fisher,Nora Dunn,Sara Gilbert,Mike Doyle

programme.title: Almost Christmas
programme.desc: A widower tries to have a traditional Christmas with his four dysfunctional children.

credits.actor: Danny Glover,Gabrielle Union,Mo'Nique,Kimberly Elise,Romany Malco,JB Smoove,Jessie T. Usher,John Michael Higgins,Nicole Ari Parker,Omar Epps,Nadej Bailey,Alkoya Brunson,Marley Taylor,DC Young Fly,Keri Hilson,Gladys Knight

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason

programme.title: Rush Hour
programme.desc: When Hong Kong Inspector Lee is summoned to Los Angeles to investigate a kidnapping, the FBI doesn't want any outside help and assigns cocky LAPD Detective James Carter to distract Lee from the case. Not content to watch the action from the sidelines, Lee and Carter form an unlikely partnership and investigate the case themselves.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man II
programme.desc: For Peter Parker, life is busy. Between taking out the bad guys as Spider-Man and spending time with the person he loves, Gwen Stacy, high school graduation cannot come quickly enough. Peter has not forgotten about the promise he made to Gwen’s father to protect her by staying away, but that is a promise he cannot keep. Things will change for Peter when a new villain, Electro, emerges, an old friend, Harry Osborn, returns, and Peter uncovers new clues about his past.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Archaeologist Rick O'Connell travels to China, pitting him against an emperor from the 2,000-year-old Han dynasty who's returned from the dead to pursue a quest for world domination. This time, O'Connell enlists the help of his wife and son to quash the so-called 'Dragon Emperor' and his abuse of supernatural power.

programme.title: Mission Impossible: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet: To track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity before it falls into the wrong hands. With control of the future and the world's fate at stake and dark forces from Ethan's past closing in, a deadly race around the globe begins. Confronted by a mysterious, all-powerful enemy, Ethan must consider that nothing can matter more than his mission—not even the lives of those he cares about most.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: After being coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver finds himself taking part in a heist doomed to fail.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In ancient Egypt, peasant Mathayus is hired to exact revenge on the powerful Memnon and the sorceress Cassandra, who are ready to overtake Balthazar's village. Amid betrayals, thieves, abductions and.

programme.title: THE WILD ROBOT
programme.desc: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz is stranded on an uninhabited island. To survive the harsh environment, Roz bonds with the island's animals and cares for an orphaned baby goose.

programme.title: Godzilla Vs. Kong
programme.desc: In a time when monsters walk the Earth, humanity’s fight for its future sets Godzilla and Kong on a collision course that will see the two most powerful forces of nature on the planet collide in a spectacular battle for the ages.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: Rowan plays the eponymous lead character in a spoof spy thriller. During the course of the story we follow our hero as he attempts to single-handedly save the country from falling into the hands of a despot.

programme.title: Force Of Execution
programme.desc: Seagal stars as mob kingpin Mr. Alexander, an old-school boss who rules his criminal empire with both nobility and brutality. For a simple prison hit, he sends his best enforcer and protégé Roman Hurs.

programme.title: The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.desc: A prominent Indian anchor interviews famous celebrities and brings out their fun side by talking about their life and love stories. India 2019.

programme.title: Backtrace
programme.desc: The lone surviving thief of a violent armored car robbery is sprung from a high security facility and administered an experimental drug.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Eccentric consulting detective, Sherlock Holmes and Doctor John Watson battle to bring down a new nemesis and unravel a deadly plot that could destroy England.

programme.title: Now You See Me
programme.desc: One year after outwitting the FBI and winning the public’s adulation with their mind-bending spectacles, the Four Horsemen resurface only to find themselves face to face with a new enemy who enlists them to pull off their most dangerous heist yet.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when a criminal mastermind reveals the identities of all active undercover agents in Britain. The secret service can now rely on only one man - Johnny English. Currently teaching at a minor prep school, Johnny springs back into action to find the mysterious hacker. For this mission to succeed, he’ll need all of his skills - what few he has - as the man with yesterday’s analogue methods faces off against tomorrow’s digital technology.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: When siblings Judy and Peter discover an enchanted board game that opens the door to a magical world, they unwittingly invite Alan -- an adult who's been trapped inside the game for 26 years -- into their living room. Alan's only hope for freedom is to finish the game, which proves risky as all three find themselves running from giant rhinoceroses, evil monkeys and other terrifying creatures.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: Explore the mysterious and dangerous home of the king of the apes as a team of explorers ventures deep inside the treacherous, primordial island.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: Set in the Mayan civilization, when a man's idyllic presence is brutally disrupted by a violent invading force, he is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression where a harrowing end awaits him. Through a twist of fate and spurred by the power of his love for his woman and his family he will make a desperate break to return home and to ultimately save his way of life.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: After supervillain Shredder escapes custody, he joins forces with mad scientist Baxter Stockman and two dimwitted henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, to unleash a diabolical plan to take over the world. As the Turtles prepare to take on Shredder and his new crew, they find themselves facing an even greater evil with similar intentions: the notorious Krang.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman's selfless act, Bruce Wayne and Diana Prince assemble a team of metahumans consisting of Barry Allen, Arthur Curry and Victor Stone to face the catastrophic threat of Steppenwolf and the Parademons who are on the hunt for three Mother Boxes on Earth.

programme.title: Constantine
programme.desc: John Constantine has literally been to Hell and back. When he teams up with a policewoman to solve the mysterious suicide of her twin sister, their investigation takes them through the world of demon.

programme.title: Piranha 3DD
programme.desc: After the events at Lake Victoria, the prehistoric school of blood-thirsty piranhas make their way into swimming pools, plumbing, and a newly opened water park.

programme.title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
programme.desc: A prominent Indian anchor interviews famous celebrities and brings out their fun side by talking about their life and love stories. India 2019.

programme.title: Freelancers
programme.desc: The son of a slain NYPD officer joins the force, where he falls in with his father's former partner and a team of rogue cops. His new boss, Sarcone, will see if he has what it takes to be rogue through many trials and tribulations of loyalty, trust and respect. When the truth about his father's death is revealed revenge takes him over and he won't stop until justice has been truly served.

programme.title: SPELL
programme.desc: A wounded man struggles to escape the grasps of an sinister elderly woman practicing Hoodoo magic.

programme.desc: In a ruthless underground tournament, the world's top assassins fight to the death.

programme.title: STOP-LOSS
programme.desc: A decorated war hero returns to his hometown only to be dragged back into the battlefield, testing his resolve towards life, love and family.

programme.title: NACHO LIBRE
